description_long: This shotgun features a steampunk-inspired design with a combination of metallic and wooden elements, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. The main body is constructed from a dark, polished wood with visible grain, complemented by brass and steel mechanical components, including exposed gears and tubing. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with metallic ribbing and venting along its length, and a prominent muzzle. A metallic scope is mounted above the barrel, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The stock is robust and full-sized, with a rounded cheek rest and a black, spherical butt pad for recoil absorption. The trigger area is protected by a large, rounded metallic guard, and various levers and mechanical parts are visible, indicating a complex action mechanism.
description: A steampunk-style shotgun with a long, ribbed barrel, metallic scope, and a full wooden stock accented by brass and steel components. The design features exposed gears, a rounded trigger guard, and a black butt pad.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed from the muzzle end, highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the scope and mechanical components along the top.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the wooden stock, metallic scope, ribbed barrel, and the intricate mechanical details along the body.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the rounded black butt pad and the alignment of the stock and barrel are prominent, with the scope and action mechanism visible along the top.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile shows the same detailed construction, with emphasis on the trigger guard, levers, and the combination of wood and metal materials.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing and venting along the length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, rounded metallic trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space for finger access
